Table AST Company Asset - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Asset %1 cannot be deleted because it is currently assigned to employee %2.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Asset No., %2 = Employee No.

Page AST Asset Assignment - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: An assignment document links one or more assets to an employee. Add lines for each asset, then Post (or Send for Approval if approval is required).
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment - Property AboutText
Page AST Asset Assignment - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Assignment - Control General - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Assignment - Control Assignment Date - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Control Department - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Control Employee Name - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Control Employee No. - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Control Expected Return Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique number of the asset assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment - Control No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the purpose of the assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment - Control Purpose - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Control StatusGroup - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Assignment - Control Approval Status - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Control Status - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: View audit log entries related to this assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment - Action ViewLog - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Action ViewLog - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Assignment - Action Approve - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Action Approve - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Assignment - Action Post - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Action Post - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Assignment - Action Reject - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Action Reject - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Send this assignment to the approver for review.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment - Action SendForApproval - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment - Action SendForApproval - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Assignment API - Control AssignmentDate - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment API - Control department - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment API - Control EmployeeName - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment API - Control EmployeeNo - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment API - Control ExpectedReturnDate - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment API - Control Number - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment API - Control postedBy - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment API - Control postingDate - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment API - Control transactionType - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment List - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: Open assignment documents waiting to be posted. Open a document to add assets, set the employee, and post the assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment List - Property AboutText
Page AST Asset Assignment List - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current approval status of the assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment List - Control Approval Status - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the assignment date of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment List - Control Assignment Date - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Assignment List - Control Employee Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique number of employee or employee number.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment List - Control Employee No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the expected return date of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment List - Control Expected Return Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique number of asset assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment List - Control No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of lines in asset assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment List - Control No. of Lines - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the status of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Assignment List - Control Status - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Category Card - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Category Card - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the type of assets in this category.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category Card - Control Category Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique code for this asset category.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category Card - Control Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the default condition applied to new assets in this category.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category Card - Control Default Condition - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the full description of the category.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category Card - Control Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether assignment of assets in this category requires approval.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category Card - Control Require Approval - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Category Card - Control Statistics - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total number of assets in this category. Click to view them.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category Card - Control No. of Assets - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: View all assets assigned to this category.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category Card - Action ViewAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Category Card - Action ViewAssets - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Category List - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: Define and manage asset categories. Each asset must belong to a category. The No. of Assets count shows how many assets are in each category — click it to drill down.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category List - Property AboutText
Page AST Asset Category List - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the type of assets in this category.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category List - Control Category Type - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Category List - Control Code - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Category List - Control Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total number of assets in this category. Click to view them.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category List - Control No. of Assets - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether assignments in this category require approval.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category List - Control Require Approval - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: View all assets in this category.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category List - Action ViewAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Category List - Action ViewAssets - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Create a new asset in this category.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Category List - Action NewAsset - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Category List - Action NewAsset - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Cue - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: Live counts of assets and assignments. Click any tile to drill down into the matching records. The Overdue tile turns red when returns are outstanding.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Cue - Property AboutText
Page AST Asset Cue - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Cue - Control AssetStatus - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows the number of assets currently assigned to employees.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Cue - Control AssignedCount - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Cue - Control AssignedCount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows the number of assets currently available for assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Cue - Control AvailableCount - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Cue - Control AvailableCount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows the number of assets currently under maintenance.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Cue - Control MaintenanceCount - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Cue - Control MaintenanceCount - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Cue - Control Assignments - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows the number of assignment documents currently open.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Cue - Control OpenAssignments - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Cue - Control OpenAssignments - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Assignments past their expected return date. Click to run the Overdue report.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Cue - Control OverdueCount - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Cue - Control OverdueCount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows the number of assignments posted today.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Cue - Control PostedToday - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Cue - Control PostedToday - Property Caption
Page AST Asset History Factbox - Property Caption
Page AST Asset History Factbox - Control Asset Status After - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset History Factbox - Control Asset Status Before - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset History Factbox - Control Employee No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique number of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset History Factbox - Control Entry No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the log date of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset History Factbox - Control Log Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the transaction type of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset History Factbox - Control Transaction Type - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Reservation Card - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Reservation List - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Reservation List - Action CancelReservation - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Statistics - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: A real-time overview of all company assets by status and total value. Click Refresh to reload the latest figures.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Statistics - Property AboutText
Page AST Asset Statistics - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Statistics - Control Overview - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of assets currently assigned to employees.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Statistics - Control AssignedAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Statistics - Control AssignedAssets - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of assets currently available for assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Statistics - Control AvailableAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Statistics - Control AvailableAssets - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of assets that have been disposed.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Statistics - Control DisposedAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Statistics - Control DisposedAssets - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total number of assets in the system.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Statistics - Control TotalAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Statistics - Control TotalAssets - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total purchase value of all assets.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Statistics - Control TotalPurchaseValue - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Statistics - Control TotalPurchaseValue - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of assets currently under maintenance.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Statistics - Control UnderMaintenanceAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Statistics - Control UnderMaintenanceAssets - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Statistics - Action Refresh - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: Recalculate all statistics to show the latest data.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Statistics - Action Refresh - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Click to reload all asset counts and values from the database.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Statistics - Action Refresh - Property AboutText
Page AST Asset Statistics - Action Refresh - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: Your central hub for managing company assets. The activity tiles show live counts. Use the navigation menu to access assets, assignments, reports, and setup.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Property AboutText
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Print the full history of assets.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetHistoryReport - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetHistoryReport - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetRegisterReport - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetRegisterReport - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Print a summary of assets per employee.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action EmployeeSummaryReport - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action EmployeeSummaryReport - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Print an asset handover letter for a posted assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action HandoverLetterReport - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action HandoverLetterReport - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Print a list of assets with overdue returns.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action OverdueReturnReport - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action OverdueReturnReport - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action Administration - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Configure the Asset Tracking module settings.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetSetup - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetSetup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Import assets from a CSV file.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action ImportAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action ImportAssets - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action Assets - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetCategories - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetCategories - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View a statistical overview of all assets.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetStatistics - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetStatistics - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View and manage all company assets.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action CompanyAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action CompanyAssets - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action Assignments - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Create and manage open asset assignment documents.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetAssignments - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action AssetAssignments - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View all posted assignment and return documents.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action PostedAssignments - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Role Center - Action PostedAssignments - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: Configure the Employee Asset Tracking module: number series, default return period, approval requirements and email notification settings.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Property AboutText
Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Property Caption
Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control Defaults - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the asset value above which approval is required.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control Approval Threshold Amount - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the default condition for new asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control Default Asset Condition - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the default number of days before asset return.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control Default Return Days - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether approval is required before posting assignments.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control Require Approval - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control Notifications - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the email address that receives admin alert notifications.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control Admin Email Address - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether email notifications are sent on assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control Send Email Notification - Property ToolTip
Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control NumberSeries - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number series for assets.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control Asset Nos. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number series for assignments.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Asset Tracking Setup - Control Assignment Nos. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the condition at handover of the asset.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the notes of the asset.

Page AST Assignment Lines Subpage - Control Serial No. - Property ToolTip

Page AST Company Asset API - Control WarrantyExpiryDate - Property Caption
Page AST Company Asset Card - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: View or edit a single asset. The Assignment group appears automatically when the asset is assigned. Use Create Assignment to assign it to an employee.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Property AboutText
Page AST Company Asset Card - Property Caption
Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Assignment - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the assigned employee.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Assigned to Employee Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the employee this asset is assigned to.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Assigned to Employee No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date this asset was last assigned.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Last Assignment Date - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Audit - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the user who created this record.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Created By - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date this record was created.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Created Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the user who last modified this record.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Last Modified By - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date this record was last modified.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Last Modified Date - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset Card - Control General - Property Caption
Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Category Code - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Category Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the physical condition of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Condition - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset Card - Control No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the serial number of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Serial No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current status of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Status - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Note - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies any additional notes or remarks about this asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Notes - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Purchase - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date the asset was purchased.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Purchase Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the original purchase price of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Purchase Price - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the vendor this asset was purchased from.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Vendor No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date the warranty expires.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Control Warranty Expiry Date - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset Card - Control AssetHistory - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View the complete history of this asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Action ViewHistory - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset Card - Action ViewHistory - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Creates a new asset assignment document for this asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset Card - Action CreateAssignment - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset Card - Action CreateAssignment - Property Caption
Page AST Company Asset List - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: Full register of all company-owned assets. Use Import Assets to load from CSV. Use Export to Excel for reporting. Colour coding shows current status at a glance.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Property AboutText
Page AST Company Asset List - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the employee this asset is currently assigned to.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Control Assigned to Employee No. - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset List - Control Category Code - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset List - Control Category Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the physical condition of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Control Condition - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset List - Control No. - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset List - Control Purchase Date - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset List - Control Purchase Price - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the serial number of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Control Serial No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current status of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Control Status - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: View all assignment documents for the selected asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Action AssetAssignment - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset List - Action AssetAssignment - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View the full audit log for the selected asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Action AssetLog - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset List - Action AssetLog - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Export the current asset list to an Excel file.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Action ExportToExcel - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset List - Action ExportToExcel - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Import company assets from a CSV file using the Asset Migration XMLport.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Action ImportAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset List - Action ImportAssets - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Print or preview the full asset register report.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Company Asset List - Action AssetRegister - Property ToolTip
Page AST Company Asset List - Action AssetRegister - Property Caption
Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: Shows a summary of assets currently assigned to this employee, total asset value, and any overdue return obligations.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Property AboutText
Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the employee whose assets are shown.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Control EmployeeNoDisplay - Property ToolTip
Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Control EmployeeNoDisplay - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Number of assignment documents past their expected return date for this employee.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Control OverdueReturns - Property ToolTip
Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Control OverdueReturns - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total number of assets currently assigned to this employee.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Control TotalAssignedAssets - Property ToolTip
Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Control TotalAssignedAssets - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total purchase value of assets assigned to this employee.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Control TotalAssignmentValue - Property ToolTip
Page AST Employee Asset Factbox - Control TotalAssignmentValue - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assign Line Subpage - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assign Line Subpage - Control Asset Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique number of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assign Line Subpage - Control Asset No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the category code of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assign Line Subpage - Control Category Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the condition at handover of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assign Line Subpage - Control Condition at Handover - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the Notes of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assign Line Subpage - Control Notes - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the serial number of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assign Line Subpage - Control Serial No. - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: A permanent record of a completed assignment. Use Process Return when the employee returns the assets — all listed assets will return to Available status.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Property AboutText
Page AST Posted Assignment - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date when assets were assigned.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Control Assignment Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the department the asset was assigned to.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Control Department - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the employee.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Control Employee Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the employee number associated with this assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Control Employee No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the expected date for asset return.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Control Expected Return Date - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment - Control No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the stated purpose of this assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Control Purpose - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment - Control PostingDetails - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the user who posted this assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Control Posted By - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date this assignment was posted.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Control Posting Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether this is an Assignment or Return transaction.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Control Transaction Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: View all log entries related to this assignment.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Action ViewAssetLog - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment - Action ViewAssetLog - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Process the return of all assets in this assignment back to Available status.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment - Action ProcessReturn - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment - Action ProcessReturn - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment API - Control assetDescription - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment API - Control assetNo - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment API - Control categoryCode - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment API - Control conditionAtHandover - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment API - Control documentNo - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment API - Control lineNo - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment API - Control serialNo - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Property AboutTitle

trans-unit.source: Permanent records of all assignment and return transactions. Use the filter actions to show only Assignments or only Returns. Overdue rows are highlighted.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment List - Property AboutText
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the assignment date of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment List - Control Assignment Date - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Control Employee Name - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Control Employee No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the expected date for asset return. Shown in red when overdue.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment List - Control Expected Return Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique number of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment List - Control No. - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Control No. of Lines - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the posting date of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment List - Control Posting Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the transaction type of the asset.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment List - Control Transaction Type - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Action ClearTypeFilter - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Action ClearTypeFilter - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Action ShowAssignments - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Action ShowAssignments - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Action ShowReturns - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Action ShowReturns - Property Caption
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Action HandoverLetter - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Action HandoverLetter - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Print the overdue asset return report.
trans-unit.note: Page AST Posted Assignment List - Action OverdueReport - Property ToolTip
Page AST Posted Assignment List - Action OverdueReport - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the status to filter assets by.

Report AST Asset Register - Control StatusFilter - Property Caption
Report AST Employee Asset Summary - Property Caption
Report AST Employee Asset Summary - Control Filters - Property Caption
Report AST Overdue Asset Return - Property Caption
Report AST Overdue Asset Return - Control Options - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date to check overdue assets against. Defaults to today.
trans-unit.note: Report AST Overdue Asset Return - Control AsOfDate - Property ToolTip
Report AST Overdue Asset Return - Control AsOfDate - Property Caption
Report AST Warranty Expiry Report - Property Caption

XmlPort AST Asset CSV Import Full - Control Options - Property Caption

XmlPort AST Asset Migration - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Print a QR/barcode label for this asset.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension AST Company Asset Card Ext - Action PrintLabel - Property ToolTip
PageExtension AST Company Asset Card Ext - Action PrintLabel - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Recalculates the depreciated book value based on purchase price and depreciation rate.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension AST Company Asset Card Ext - Action RecalcBookValue - Property ToolTip
PageExtension AST Company Asset Card Ext - Action RecalcBookValue - Property Caption
PageExtension AST Company Asset Card Ext - Control Depreciation - Property Caption
PageExtension AST Company Asset Card Ext - Control Location - Property Caption
PageExtension AST Company Asset Card Ext - Control PhotoGroup - Property Caption
PageExtension AST Company Asset Card Ext - Control ReturnInfo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Process return and capture condition at return for each asset.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension AST Posted Assignment Ext - Action ProcessReturnWithCondition - Property ToolTip
PageExtension AST Posted Assignment Ext - Action ProcessReturnWithCondition - Property Caption
PageExtension AST Posted Assignment Ext - Control ReturnDetails - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the condition of the asset when returned by the employee.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension AST Posted Lines Ext - Control Condition at Return - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Indicates the asset condition worsened between handover and return.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension AST Posted Lines Ext - Control Condition Degraded - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Notes about the asset condition at the time of return.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension AST Posted Lines Ext - Control Return Notes - Property ToolTip
PageExtension AST Setup Page Ext - Action RunOverdueNow - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Creates or refreshes the daily Overdue Check and weekly Depreciation Batch job queue entries.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension AST Setup Page Ext - Action SetupJobQueues - Property ToolTip
PageExtension AST Setup Page Ext - Action SetupJobQueues - Property Caption
PageExtension AST Setup Page Ext - Control AlertGroup - Property Caption

PageExtension AST Setup Page Ext - Control TransferGroup - Property Caption
PageExtension ASTAssetCueExt - Action RunDepreciationExt - Property Caption
PageExtension ASTAssetCueExt - Action RunOverdueCheckExt - Property Caption
PageExtension ASTAssetCueExt - Control ActiveReservations - Property ToolTip
PageExtension ASTAssetCueExt - Control ActiveReservations - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Number of asset transfer documents in Open status.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ASTAssetCueExt - Control OpenTransfers - Property ToolTip
PageExtension ASTAssetCueExt - Control OpenTransfers - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Assets flagged as overdue by the daily job. Click to view.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension ASTAssetCueExt - Control OverdueByFlag - Property ToolTip
PageExtension ASTAssetCueExt - Control OverdueByFlag - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Assets with warranty expiring within 30 days.
